news.summary: In the fiscal year ending on December 31, 2024, the company generated net revenues amounting to $54.2 million, showcasing a significant growth of $31.4 million or 138.1% when compared to the preceding year.
news.headline: Celularity reported a 138.1% increase in net revenues for 2024, totaling $54.2 million.

news.summary: The Management Board of AS Merko Ehitus decided on May 9, 2025 to extend the term of Mr. Martin Rebane, a Member of the Supervisory Board of AS Merko Ehitus Eesti, until May 10, 2028. The Supervisory Board of AS Merko Ehitus Eesti will retain a total of four members, with Mr. Ivo Volkov serving as the Chairman, accompanied by Mr. Tõnu Toomik, Mr. Urmas Somelar, and Mr. Martin Rebane.
news.headline: Mr. Martin Rebane's powers as Member of AS Merko Ehitus Eesti's Supervisory Board extended until May 10, 2028; Board has four members.
Fed's Williams: Both sides of the Fed mandate are important.

news.summary: A collaborative venture between Indra, Audi of America, and Qualcomm Technologies, Inc. in Madrid aims to pioneer cutting-edge toll payment systems leveraging cellular vehicle-to-everything (C-V2X) technology. The project's primary goal is to demonstrate how C-V2X equipped vehicles can alleviate traffic congestion on toll routes, establish uniform payment mechanisms on a national scale, and upgrade the overall driving experience. This innovative payment solution, aligned with global Society of Automotive Engineers standards, signifies a significant step towards next-generation transportation systems, with potential benefits extending to smoother traffic flow and improved driver convenience.
news.headline: Indra, Audi, and Qualcomm collaborate for tolling innovation with C-V2X. Aims to enhance driver experience and standardize payments, reducing congestion.

news.summary: A company based in New York, QuantHealth, has introduced its latest innovation, the Large Real-World Drug Model (LRDM v1.0). This groundbreaking clinical trial foundation model is powered by AI and is capable of analyzing data from over 100 million patients and billions of therapeutic data points within a single simulation. By utilizing end-to-end transformer architectures, the LRDM v1.0 by QuantHealth marks a significant advancement in utilizing AI technology to forecast drug efficacy and patient responses.
news.headline: QuantHealth introduces LRDM v1.0, a model processing data from over 100M patients & billions of therapeutic datapoints for clinical trial simulations.

news.summary: In San Diego, Nuvve Holding Corp. (NASDAQ: NVVE), known for vehicle-to-grid (V2G) tech, has enlisted top digital asset advisory consultants to boost its subsidiary, Nuvve-DigitalAssets. These experts will aid in the growth of the digital asset portfolio by guiding on token selection, decentralized infrastructure opportunities, and risk management. This move aims to enhance Nuvve's position as a key player in grid modernization. This initiative is part of the broader strategy to advance company assets and drive innovation in the industry.
news.headline: Nuvve partners with Crypto Venture Group to boost Digital Asset Strategy. $NVVE, a V2G technology leader, forms subsidiary Nuvve-DigitalAssets.

news.summary: CuriosityStream Inc., a notable global factual entertainment media company, based in Silver Spring, Maryland, declared a special, one-time cash dividend of $0.10 per share for its shareholders. The dividend is set to be paid on June 27, 2025, to shareholders recorded on June 13, 2025. Clint Stinchcomb, the CEO of CuriosityStream, highlighted that the decision to provide this dividend emphasizes the company's robust financial standing and aims to recognize the continued backing of its shareholders.
news.headline: CuriosityStream declares special one-time cash dividend of $0.10 per share to be paid on June 27, 2025.

news.summary: Northern Trust, a reputable wealth management services provider based in Chicago, has recently achieved significant recognition at the Financial Times and PWM’s Wealth Tech Awards. The company has been awarded top positions in two categories, being named the “Best Private Bank in the U.S. for Digital Wealth Planning” and the “Best Private Bank in the U.S. for Digital Customer Experience”. These accolades were granted as part of the prestigious Wealth Tech Awards which aim to acknowledge and commend technological advancements within the wealth management sector. The awards, judged by a panel of industry experts, shine a spotlight on companies and products that effectively utilize technology in enhancing services.
news.headline: Northern Trust named Best Private Bank in U.S. for Digital Wealth Planning and Digital Customer Experience by Financial Times.

news.summary: A leading global business management software provider, Aderant®, based in Atlanta, has recently renewed its strategic partnership with LawPay for multiple years. The partnership aims to continue providing innovative solutions to their clients.
news.headline: Aderant renews partnership with LawPay for integrated online payment services for Aderant Expert/Sierra clients in a multi-year agreement.
Fed's Barkin: It is not a given that firms can raise prices on tariffs.

news.summary: Allegro MicroSystems, Inc. (NASDAQ: ALGM) announced strong fourth-quarter results, surpassing expectations. The company reported adjusted earnings of $0.06 per share, outperforming the forecast of $0.05 per share. Quarterly sales stood at $192.82 million, exceeding estimates of $185.28 million. Mike Doogue, President and CEO, highlighted the company's achievement in meeting sales commitments, indicating a positive trend in business momentum and customer engagement. The company remains optimistic despite a dynamic environment. For detailed information, refer to the complete report on Benzinga.com.
news.headline: Allegro MicroSystems (ALGM) surpass Q4 expectations with $192.82 million in sales, 6 cents EPS. CEO optimistic.
WTO Spokesperson on US-China trade talks in Geneva this weekend: The Director-General welcomes talks as a positive and constructive step toward de-escalation.

news.summary: Hithium debuted its complete range of energy storage solutions at The smarter E Europe event in Munich from May 7-9, 2025. The highlight was the release of the ∞Power 6.25MWh 2h/4h BESS EU Version, specifically tailored for European market needs. This system marks a significant step forward for Hithium, offering a capacity of 6.25 megawatt-hours and flexible operation durations of 2 to 4 hours. The product showcase emphasized five essential aspects of this innovative energy storage offering.
news.headline: Hithium launches ∞Power 6.25MWh BESS EU Version at The smarter E Europe, plans partnership with GCRPV for manufacturing in Europe.

news.summary: Experts in the industry are providing advice and plans to excel in a changing job market in Chicago. On May 9, 2025, Built In, an AI-driven recruitment platform for tech experts, unveiled two crucial tools to aid talent acquisition teams in adjusting to the changing landscape.
news.headline: Built In released Talent Trend Report and Expert Panel Discussion to help talent acquisition teams in tech industry.

news.summary: A company based in Beloit, Wisconsin, Fairbanks Morse Defense, has appointed Steve Pykett as its new Chief Executive Officer. With over 25 years of experience in the aerospace and defense sector, Steve previously held the position of President of Investment Castings at Precision Castparts Corp (PCC), where he oversaw substantial growth in a worldwide operation. Fairbanks Morse Defense is a prominent provider of OEM and aftermarket services for critical marine technologies. This announcement marks an important development for the company, with Steve Pykett's expertise poised to contribute significantly to its future endeavors.
news.headline: Fairbanks Morse Defense appoints Steve Pykett as new CEO, with 25 years of experience. Formerly President at PCC.

news.summary: In Tulsa, Oklahoma, Whiptail Midstream, LLC, a company owned by I Squared Capital, a global infrastructure investment manager, has sold its San Juan Basin midstream business to an MPLX LP subsidiary for $237 million in cash. The sale includes Whiptail Midstream's oil, gas, and water gathering systems in the San Juan Basin, which have been vital in facilitating growth.
news.headline: Whiptail Midstream sells San Juan Basin business to MPLX LP for $237 million cash, supporting region's growth.
Acquisition of 8.3% stake in Primary Health Properties Plc reported.
Fed's Williams: Trump comments don't make job harder.

news.summary: A new exclusive agreement has been reached, offering LENZ up to $125 million in upfront and milestone payments. Additionally, LENZ will receive double-digit royalties on future net sales as part of the agreement.
news.headline: LENZ & Lotus Pharm sign $125M exclusive license for LNZ100 in Korea & Southeast Asia, incl. double-digit royalties.
Fed's Willliams: The next few quarters will help illuminate economy's state of affairs.

news.summary: In New York, Contraluz introduces the world's first Cristalino Tequila, expanding from Mezcal to include 100% Blue Agave Tequila. Contraluz Cristalino Tequila offers a smooth, modern taste, redefining the category with its innovation and artistry. This marks the third expression under the Contraluz brand, aimed at enhancing everyday toasts. This fresh perspective on Mexico's iconic spirits showcases Contraluz's commitment to pushing boundaries and creating distinctive offerings for consumers.
news.headline: Contraluz debuts new Cristalino Tequila, elevating everyday toasts; expansion from Mezcal into 100% Blue Agave Tequila.

Fed's Willliams: Now is an inflection point between hard and soft data.

news.summary: Telos Corporation, headquartered in Ashburn, Virginia, released its financial results for the first quarter of 2025. The company, listed on NASDAQ under the symbol TLS, specializes in cybersecurity, cloud, and enterprise security services catered towards highly secure organizations. Interested individuals can access the detailed financial report on Telos Corporation's investor relations website at https://investors.telos.com.
news.headline: Telos Corporation in Ashburn announces Q1 2025 earnings on its investor relations website, accessible at investors.telos.com.

news.summary: Cloudflare Inc (NYSE: NET) released its first-quarter financial results, showing revenue of $479.09 million, surpassing estimates of $469.28 million. Adjusted EPS stood at 16 cents, slightly below estimates of 17 cents. Cloudflare's CEO, Matthew Prince, expressed optimism over the company's performance, citing significant achievements such as securing a record-breaking contract worth over $100 million through their Workers developer platform. The company also signed the lengthiest SASE contract to date. Cloudflare anticipates second-quarter revenue to reach $500 million.
news.headline: Cloudflare Q1 revenue: $479.09M, missing EPS; Largest deal over $100M; 2Q revenue expected $500M. CEO optimistic.
Fed's Williams: Markets are focused on downside risks to US growth.
Kremlin: Russia and the US discussed gas supply to europe - Tass.

news.summary: A global provider of services for CPA and accounting firms, MYCPE ONE, known for its emphasis on prioritizing its employees, was honored with the Workplace Culture Excellence Award from BDO Alliance USA at the EVOLVE 2025 event in Houston on May 9, 2025.
news.headline: MYCPE ONE wins Workplace Culture Excellence Award from BDO Alliance USA at EVOLVE 2025, recognized for people-first culture.

news.summary: In Hong Kong on May 9, 2025, Lei Xia, the CEO of ICZOOM Group Inc. (Nasdaq: IZM), a B2B online platform for electronic component products, participated as a guest speaker at the 2025 China (Shenzhen) Industrial Internet Overseas event. Mr. Xia, as the founder of ICZOOM, shared insights at the event.
news.headline: ICZOOM CEO Lei Xia speaks at 2025 China (Shenzhen) Industrial Internet Overseas Conf. - ICZOOM is a B2B e-commerce platform.

news.summary: In Upland, California on May 9, 2025, Tiny Land, a popular children's toy company known for its modern designs and commitment to environmentally-friendly practices, launched the DuoPlay Mud Kitchen for toddlers. This innovative playset encourages dual-sensory play with features for both mud and water activities. This new addition to Tiny Land's product line aims to provide children with engaging and sustainable play experiences.
news.headline: Tiny Land introduces DuoPlay Mud Kitchen for toddlers, enhancing outdoor play with dual-sensory experience.

news.summary: On May 9, 2025, Jacmel Partners, a minority-owned alternative investment company, revealed that its Jacmel Infrastructure platform, backed by GCM Grosvenor (Nasdaq: GCMG), a worldwide alternative asset management provider, has undertaken a significant action...
news.headline: Jacmel Partners invests in LaGuardia Airport Terminal B with $3M from GCM Grosvenor; growth in infrastructure sector.

news.summary: Hyundai introduces its latest electric SUV, the IONIQ 9, tailored for contemporary families with a unique "Space to Connect" campaign. This initiative emphasizes the roomy interior, cutting-edge technology, and adaptable lifestyle features of the IONIQ 9. The campaign will present innovative content on various prestigious platforms, including playoff events, to promote the vehicle's family-friendly design and functionality.
news.headline: Hyundai launches "Space to Connect" campaign showcasing IONIQ 9, first three-row electric SUV, highlighting spacious interior and advanced tech.
Fed's Willliams: Markets appear convinced Fed will get inflation back to 2%.

news.summary: Horace Mann Educators Corporation, a leading multiline financial services company on the NYSE, has recently entered a strategic partnership with Crayola, known for its association with color, creativity, and education. This collaboration brings together two organizations dedicated to supporting educators and schools. This partnership aims to create a lasting impact through joint initiatives focused on education and community. The partnership showcases a mutual commitment to enriching the lives of educators and students, exemplifying shared values and objectives.
news.headline: Horace Mann partners with Crayola to support educators; NYSE:HMN corporation joins hands with iconic brand.

news.summary: ImageTrend, a prominent provider of cloud-based software solutions for emergency medical services, fire departments, and hospitals, has recently partnered with Airmedic, an aeromedical provider located in Québec. The collaboration aims to enhance the efficiency and effectiveness of medical transportation services. The partnership was officially announced on May 9, 2025. No specific financial details were disclosed, but the partnership is expected to significantly impact both companies' operations by leveraging Airmedic's expertise in private air medical transport. This move signifies a step forward in improving emergency response systems and medical services in the respective regions.
news.headline: ImageTrend partners with Airmedic in Québec for aeromedical response, offering cloud-based solutions.

news.summary: In Seoul, South Korea, the highly anticipated mystery adventure game 'Staffer Case' is now open for global pre-order on the popular gaming console, Nintendo Switch. Gamers worldwide have the opportunity to reserve their copy of the game up until May 28.
news.headline: Pre-orders for mystery adventure game 'Staffer Case' on Nintendo Switch available until May 28 globally.

news.summary: Today, Sculptor Capital Management, Inc., a prominent alternative asset manager focused on opportunistic investing, revealed the finalization of Sculptor CLO XXXV, also known as CLO 35. This collateralized loan obligation amounts to $408 million.
news.headline: Sculptor Capital Management closes Sculptor CLO XXXV with $408 million in assets.

news.summary: In an exciting development, Sunny Health & Fitness has acquired JLL Fitness, a renowned UK brand specializing in top-notch fitness gear for home and commercial applications. This strategic acquisition expands Sunny's worldwide presence and consolidates its standing in the thriving connected fitness sector. With headquarters in Birmingham, JLL brings over 13 years of experience in providing durable, performance-driven products. Sunny's move signals a significant push in the fitness market, showcasing their commitment to growth and innovation.
news.headline: Sunny Health & Fitness acquires UK's JLL Fitness, expanding global reach in fitness market. JLL has over 13 years of expertise.

news.summary: In New York on May 9, 2025, Genesis House introduced its spring installation created in partnership with Gwyneth Paltrow, founder and CEO of goop. The immersive experience, titled "The Forest Within," merges wellness and nature to provide guests with a unique retreat. This new installation aims to offer a rejuvenating escape for visitors by immersing them in a serene natural setting.
news.headline: Genesis and Gwyneth Paltrow launch 'The Forest Within' retreat in NYC, blending wellness and nature. Installation aims to provide immersive experience.

news.summary: On May 9, 2025, in Houston, Vortex Companies, known for its trenchless infrastructure solutions worldwide, announced the acquisition of Foraction. Foraction is a top provider of trenchless watermain renewal services in North America. This move is part of Vortex Companies' ambitious expansion plan. The company is based in the south shore region.
news.headline: Vortex Companies acquires Foraction, Quebec's top trenchless watermain rehab contractor, bolstering its growth strategy.
